name: Special Jollof Rice
description: Our signature smoky party jollof rice served with plantain and your choice of protein.

name: Spaghetti Stir-fry
description: Rich and spicy spaghetti tossed with fresh vegetables and beef chunks.

name: Grilled Croaker Fish
description: Perfectly spiced and grilled croaker fish garnished with onions and peppers, served with fries or plantain.

name: Classic Meat Pie
description: Flaky and buttery pastry filled with seasoned minced meat and potatoes.

name: Freshly Baked Sausage Roll
description: Savoury sausage meat wrapped in our signature golden puff pastry.

name: Chicken Suya
description: Tender chicken pieces marinated in spicy yaji peanut rub and grilled to perfection.

name: Fried Rice & Chicken
description: Classic Nigerian fried rice packed with liver and veggies, served with crispy fried chicken.

name: Chilled Zobo Drink
description: Refreshing hibiscus tea infused with ginger, cloves, and pineapple.

name: Puff Puff
description: Deep-fried sweet dough balls, crispy on the outside and fluffy inside.

name: Red Velvet Cake Slice
description: Moist red velvet sponge with rich cream cheese frosting.
